title: OPH Universe Timeline Visualization Payload
description: Schema for OPH-FPE visualization payloads that show observer-like self-reading systems: bounded patches with local state, ports or boundaries, readback, records, feedback or repair moves, and public receipts. Diagnostic views must not be promoted to strict neutral bulk, matter particles, or physical CMB prediction unless the corresponding receipts are true.

subjectiveObserverCameras.description: Observer-local rendering cameras derived from visible observer readouts. These are subjective readout cameras, not hidden global cameras.

geometriesAndSymmetries.description: Human-readable explanations and receipt summaries for visible geometries and symmetries.

receiptMap.description: Receipt entries are strict gates. Missing keys must be rendered as absent, never as passing.

visualizationRenderData.description: Renderer-ready convenience data derived from the authoritative payload: availability counts, camera presets, scene graph, animation timeline, plot series, legends, and claim badges.

repairPlayback.description: Renderer timing policy for gradual repair animation. Use playbackRelativeTime for UI playback and rawRelativeTime/cycle for auditable simulation timing.

visualizationViews.description: First-class view contracts for web visualizers. These views name the intended panels and the payload fields that support them without promoting closed receipts.

sectionKind.description: Stable machine-readable section type for custom visualizers.

visualMetaphor.description: Short visual intent, not a physical claim.

promotionReceiptsRequired.description: Receipt names that would be required before upgrading this view from diagnostic rendering to the corresponding physical claim.

nonClaims.description: Labels the visualizer must avoid unless future receipts explicitly pass.

visibleProtoWorldlines.description: Observer-camera projection sightings of proto-worldline events at this frame. These are diagnostic renderer/readout sightings and do not promote particle-matter receipts.

peripheralDiagnosticProtoWorldlines.description: Out-of-nominal-FOV full-sky diagnostics; never count these rows as directly visible.

h3ChartStatus.description: Renderer-facing H3 chart status. False promotion receipts with displayStatus=not_promoted or blocked should not be rendered as chart errors.

receiptDisplay.description: Per-receipt display semantics for UI badges, including severity and whether a false receipt should render as an error.

observedRows.description: Observed CMB TT rows derived from residualRows for renderers that want separate observed/model series.

modelRows.description: Best OPH diagnostic model TT rows derived from residualRows for renderers that want separate observed/model series.
